hero.title: A production-ready frontend template
hero.subtitle: Authentication, role-based access control, dashboards, and data tables — wired up and ready, so you can start on your product instead of your boilerplate.

features.title: Everything already wired up
features.subtitle: The pieces every dashboard app needs, built in from the start.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: JWT or session-based auth with automatic token refresh, out of the box.

rbac.title: Role & permission based access
rbac.description: Route guards and component HOCs for coarse roles and fine-grained permissions.

dashboards.title: Dashboard layout
dashboards.description: A responsive shell with navigation, theming, and progress feedback on every route.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Multi-language support powered by i18next, synced with the signed-in user's locale.

data_tables.title: Data tables
data_tables.description: Sortable, paginated, filterable tables ready to plug into any list endpoint.

performance.title: Built for speed
performance.description: Vite, lazy-loaded routes, and code-split pages keep the app fast by default.

cta.title: Start building today
cta.subtitle: Clone the template, set your environment variables, and you're off — the scaffolding is done.

role_permission.role_text: Your assigned role determines your base level of access. Roles are managed by administrators.
role_permission.permission_text: All permissions granted to you — from your role and any direct grants. These determine what actions you can perform.

session.session_text: Manage your active sessions. Revoke any session you don't recognize.

rbac.title: Roles & Permissions
rbac.subtitle: Manage roles and browse every permission the system provides
rbac.roles_text: Roles bundle permissions and are assigned to users
rbac.permissions_text: All permissions the backend provides, grouped by domain
rbac.permissions_forbidden: You do not have permission to view the permission catalog

rbac.role_dialog_text: Set the role name, description and the permissions it grants
rbac.name: Name
rbac.assign_role_text: Change the role this user holds
rbac.direct_permissions_text: Extra grants on top of the role's permissions
rbac.effective_permissions_text: Everything this user can do — role permissions plus direct grants
